name: Dawn Rose
notes: Originally a fishing vessel, converted to cargo use.

name: Gilt Blades
notes: Captain's quarters. Portuguese-style. Manageable with reduced crew of 5. Flagship. Updated with power source, +60% speed.

name: Wold Anchor
notes: Similar to Gilt Blades but less refined. Hidden compartment. Updated with power source, +60% speed.

name: Sovi
notes: Likely former slaver vessel. Large enough for 23 passengers plus crew. No luxury fittings. Updated with power source, +60% speed.

name: Shalindra
notes: Not Dawn Blades property. Allied vessel. Essavane captaining. Updated with power source, +60% speed.

name: Revivify
ownership: deeded to Order of Solmir, Dawn Blades occupy
notes: Former Kreel residence. Marcus managing, Miren and Dav assisting. Common room, kitchen, multiple sleeping areas. Workshop space still needed. Brings in 1d4 + 3 refugees per week, plus occasional donations. Refugees often stay for months or longer, so turnover is low. Refugees are people in crisis — fleeing abuse, escaping trafficking, rebuilding after loss. Not a hotel or hostel — more of a sanctuary and support center. Refugees receive care and support to get back on their feet, but not long-term housing or job placement. The goal is to help them get to a place where they can thrive independently, we even offer trades.

name: Overflow Warehouse
notes: Potential Long Arm Trading property.

name: The Winery at Fogstone Hill
furnishings_notes: Furs: bearskin, 2x wolf, seal fur for Sovi already delivered. 15x pillows in one room with a couple furs. Study renovated: floor-to-ceiling shelving, three lockable dual-key cabinets, new desk, two visitor chairs, curtains, rugs, cushioning, reading lamp, few considered objects. Plenty of beds and bedding. Upstairs and outbuildings well furnished.
notes: 3/4 miles southeast of Khemrise. Main house, east outbuilding, stable, courtyard, vineyard rows. Ledwent managing..

name: Marchant Wool Imports
notes: Real wool trading operation with genuine clients and good regional reputation. Just getting rebuilt as a new brand, will increase as it grows. Harwick managing with Rendwick offering contacts.

name: Filas Apothecary
ownership: Dawn Blades own the building, Prestiria Filas operates
notes: Real apothecary, legitimate pharmacist Prestiria Filas. Solid client base, real medicines. Tova handled ownership transition professionally. Supplier relationship with Trevash herb merchant.

name: Loan Dragon
notes: Reformed loan shark operation. Jessyl Denmar manages, Big Tam and Gritch enforce.

name: Long Arm Trading
ownership: Dawn Blades partner, 16% cut to Helena Sable
notes: Helena Sable 16% partner. Overflow warehouse potential LA Trading property.

name: Millhaven Mine
notes: operated by Coalbeard

name: Farendale House
notes: Two minute walk from Revivify.

name: Crestgate Townhouse
notes: End of row, two levels, side garden. Two minutes from main market square. Comfortable, formerly wealthy owner. Good access, central location.

name: Arrenway Townhouse
notes: Middle of row, modest neighborhood. Area doesn't see people come and go often — difficult to visit unnoticed. Small cellar. Comfortable, formerly wealthy owner. Better suited for discreet use than public-facing operations.

name: Argent Sunrise
notes: Manageable with reduced crew of 5. Very dark hull and signs of repairs. Some sections of wood are double-thick.

name: Nossa Valessa
ownership: Dawn Blades, purchased from Drevorn estate
notes: Three levels, each smaller than the last due to decks and balconies built over rooms below. Eight bedrooms, two large reception rooms, central courtyard with fountain restored and operational. Staff quarters in east wing, six rooms. Kitchen large and well positioned. Stone construction throughout, structurally sound. Walled and gated on two sides, cliff edge on the other two — natural defensibility. Fully refurbished, repaired, and repainted to a high standard — one of the finest private residences on the cliff line. Gardens shaped from original wild growth, intentionally preserved where possible. Teleportation circle established. Sivenne Althar appointed house steward. Has hosted at least one masquerade ball — the restoration has been noticed by neighbors. Former most prestigious address on the cliff line, status restored.

name: Ravenquay Docks Warehouse
notes: Morrow and Selt staying as tenants.

name: Khemrise Midcity Townhouse
notes: Tailor's workshop staying as tenant. Formerly Ostwick family property.

name: Veilgarten Block - Brewery and Beer Garden
notes: Ground floor converted to brewery operation. Shared central courtyard claimed as beer garden. Copper vessels and fittings planned using recovered copper architectural sheets. Gwynn operating as brewer, 20% stake, full recipe control in writing. Decorative hops on south courtyard wall. Fire pit and simple food service. Sourcing grain and hops from orc neighborhood farms via Orvha relationship. Upper two floors residential.

name: Veilgarten Block - Tailor
notes: Existing tailor's workshop staying as tenant. Upper floor residential.

name: Veilgarten Block - Carter
notes: Existing carter and storage operation staying as tenant. Upper floor residential.

name: Bluff House
notes: Double lot. Two floors, four rooms plus common room and kitchen. Ocean view west. Stone floors suitable for teleportation circle inscription. Needs roof repair northwest corner and damp addressed in left back room. One street below Voryn temple. Purchased Day 75 Year 468 for 420 gold from Nimbri Tatch.

name: Lake Plot
notes: Approximately 110ft lake frontage, 400ft depth. Both banks of eastern creek included. Road access on eastern boundary. Abandoned foundation claim next door absorbed. Registered Day 76 Year 468. Annual fee 8 gold. Vision: exclusive high-end establishment. Secondary use: private dock for Dawn Blades vessels. Neighboring plot could be used for something else.

name: Eye of the Deep
crew_notes: Roughly 12–13. Mix of Catrin, Drevani, Hei'ugar.
armament: Bow ram and angled armor plating. 1x forward-facing ballista (new). 2x swivel-mounted light ballistae (port and starboard, original).
notes: Captured from Corrath's pirate crew.

name: Ocean Huntress
armament: Bow ram and angled armor plating. 1x forward-facing ballista (new). 2x swivel-mounted light ballistae (port and starboard, original). 2x aft-mounted light cannons (new, replacing single heavier cannon).

name: Stillwater Harbor
notes: A compact waterfront complex comprising two stone buildings flanking a sheltered mooring area. The larger building rises three levels and anchors the eastern end of the property; the smaller stands two levels to the west, with the gap between them forming a natural, partially enclosed berth. A small wooden dock extends from the mooring area into the water. Stone construction throughout the buildings, functional and solid. The layout gives the complex a natural discretion — vessels can moor out of open view, with direct access to both structures.
